_comment: TXF v2.0 token projection. Brand COLORS are derived from the engine core palette by src/emit/txf.mjs and must not be duplicated here. This file holds only the TXF-specific structural scales and the two dark-surface values (surface, card) that are unique to the TXF runtime and are not part of the engine semantic themes. Editing the engine emerald (tokens/core/color.json) propagates to TXF tokens automatically; editing a structural scale here is the single authoring point for that scale.

typography.mono_family: JetBrains Mono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace
